LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ALBERT WATSON'S MOTION FOR INJUNCTION IS OFF CALENDAR. AS TO DEFENDANT JUDGE WOOLARD, THE MOTION IS MOOT. THE COURT SUSTAINED JUDGE WOOLARD'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, ON NOVEMBER 16, 2015. THE MOTION IS OFF CALENDAR AS TO THE REMAINING DEFENDANTS BECAUSE NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PROVIDED OR FILED AS TO THE REMAINING DEFENDANTS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHARLOTTE WOOLARD DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE BASED ENTIRELY ON JUDGE WOOLARD'S ADJUDICATIVE ACTS AND ARE BARRED BY ABSOLUTE JUDICIAL IMMUNITY. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS, WHICH ARE BASED ON JUDICIAL ACTIONS BETWEEN 1998 AND 2001, ARE ALSO BARRED UNDER CALIFORNIA STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. (SEE CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 312-366.). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LYNN O'MALLEY-TAYLOR; CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Off Calendar

Motion For Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ALBERT WATSON'S Motion For Injunction is off calendar. As to Defendant Judge Woolard, the motion is moot. The court sustained Judge Woolard's demurrer to the first amended complaint, without leave to amend, on November 16, 2015. The motion is off calendar as to the remaining defendants because no proof of service was provided or filed as to the remaining defendants. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Continued To Jan-06-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kimberly M. Drake of Jarvis, Fay, Doporto & Gibson telephone number 510-238-1408 for Defendant Charlotte Woolard;
No other appearance on this matter.

Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHARLOTTE WOOLARD DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff's claims are based entirely on Judge Woolard's adjudicative acts and are barred by absolute judicial immunity. Plaintiff's claims, which are based on judicial actions between 1998 and 2001, are also barred under California statute of limitations. (See California Code of Civil Procedure 312-366.). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor; Clerk: Rosie Noguera; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/LT

Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Denied

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CHARLOTTE WOOLARD'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to November 16, 2015, to give all parties a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. All parties are ordered to provide courtesy copies of their filings with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg
